faucets.name: Beta Github Faucet
faucets.description: Authenticate with GitHub to receive test tokens on the Beta Mainnet

faucets.name: Beta Gno.land
faucets.description: Apply for access to the Beta gno.land chain. Applications are reviewed manually.

faucets.name: Test11 network
faucets.description: The latest gno.land testnet running the latest stable versions of Gno, Gno.land and TM2

faucets.name: Staging
faucets.description: A nightly staging testnet used for experimenting with the latest versions of Gno, Gno.land, and TM2

faucets.name: Boards2 Mobile Faucet
faucets.description: The Boards2 Mobile faucet is here to provide you with a smooth experience when onboarding a new user to the Boards2 Mobile app. The dApp uses the faucet behind the scenes to provide initial funds for the user to interact with the gnoverse boards2-mobile realm.
